checks.detail:
run.py help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py [-h]
              {start,doctor,capl,canoe,tui,shell,scenario,verify,evidence,gate,package,release,contract}
              ...

Unified script launcher

positional arguments:
  {start,doctor,capl,canoe,tui,shell,scenario,verify,evidence,gate,package,release,contract}
    start               Operator-first quick entrypoints
    doctor              Check CANoe COM + measurement + required sysvars
    capl                CAPL-linked sysvar access via CANoe COM
    canoe               CANoe COM control plane
    tui                 Product-style Textual operator console
    shell               Interactive slash-command shell
    scenario            Manual scenario trigger commands (no panel)
    verify              Verification pipeline commands
    evidence            Evidence/readout focused commands
    gate                Quality gate commands
    package             Build/distribution commands
    release             Distribution-focused wrappers
    contract            Show canonical command contract

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

scenario group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py scenario [-h] {run} ...

positional arguments:
  {run}
    run       Send scenario command via CANoe COM

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

verify group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py verify [-h]
                     {prepare,batch,smoke,quick,fill-score,insight,bind-doc,fill-template,status,surface-bundle,finalize}
                     ...

positional arguments:
  {prepare,batch,smoke,quick,fill-score,insight,bind-doc,fill-template,status,surface-bundle,finalize}
    prepare             Create UT/IT/ST evidence run folders
    batch               Run Dev2 pre/post/full batch workflow
    smoke               Run CANoe COM smoke checks
    quick               Run prepare + smoke + status in one flow
    fill-score          Fill and score one tier
    insight             Build run-level insight report
    bind-doc            Build 05/06/07 doc binding bundle
    fill-template       Build 05/06/07 doc fill template
    status              Check run readiness before finalize
    surface-bundle      Build reviewer-facing surface ECU evidence bundle
    finalize            Run full post-run verification bundle

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

gate group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py gate [-h]
                   {all,doc-sync,text-integrity,cfg-hygiene,capl-sync,multibus-dbc,cli-readiness}
                   ...

positional arguments:
  {all,doc-sync,text-integrity,cfg-hygiene,capl-sync,multibus-dbc,cli-readiness}
    all                 Run the full gate bundle
    doc-sync            Run Req-Doc-Code sync gate
    text-integrity      Run mojibake/question-run text integrity gate
    cfg-hygiene         Run cfg text hygiene gate
    capl-sync           Run src/capl vs cfg/channel_assign sync gate
    multibus-dbc        Run multi-bus cfg + DBC domain policy gate
    cli-readiness       Run CLI readiness gate before GUI phase

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

package group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py package [-h] {build-exe,bundle-portable,validate-contract} ...

positional arguments:
  {build-exe,bundle-portable,validate-contract}
    build-exe           Build Windows exe bundle via PyInstaller
    bundle-portable     Create portable ZIP (exe + required runtime files)
    validate-contract   Validate manifest/layout packaging contract

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
